aria: native and Field semantics observed in canonical Chrome

unknowns.reason: Base UI event details, autofill/password managers, IME, RTL, selection ranges, clipboard rejection, and platform accessibility-tree differences remain inherited/vendor unknowns.
Canonical vectors specify only successful copy events and do not establish failure callback or announcement behavior.
Canonical vectors establish a Copied announcement after success but not insertion delay, retention, clearing, or repeated-copy behavior.
Canonical contract does not establish the live-region element, role, aria-live value, aria-atomic value, or DOM placement.
Canonical contract establishes button activation and focus but not the button accessible name, type, descendants, or exact DOM placement.

missingOperations.reason: Clipboard rejection behavior and failure callbacks are not established by canonical vectors.
Announcement timing, clearing, and repeated-copy behavior are not established by canonical vectors.
Live-region role, aria attributes, and DOM placement are not established by the canonical contract.
Button accessible name, type, descendants, and exact DOM placement are not established by the canonical contract.
